summary: Iteration 244: Complete testing of Canonical ServicePageTemplate with 8 sections. All priority service pages (Printing, Office Branding, Graphic Design) verified working correctly. Regression tests passed for About, Privacy, Help Center, and Admin Settings Hub Welcome Bonus Campaign.

minor.issue: Returns 404 for services - backend service catalog not seeded. DynamicServiceDetailPage uses static fallback data from comprehensiveServiceData.js which works correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Shows 'Service Not Found' because it relies on backend API without static fallback. DynamicServiceDetailPage at /services/:slug works correctly with static fallback.
integration_issues.note: This is expected behavior - ServiceDetailContent is designed for backend-seeded services

sections_verified: ServiceHero - Dark bg, group label, title, description, 2 CTAs (Request Quote + Get Business Pricing)
ServiceIncludes - Grid of items with check icons
ServiceAudience - Who it's for section with arrow icons
ServiceProcess - 4 numbered steps with connector line
ServiceBenefits - Benefits list with gold check icons
ServiceUseCases - Cards with lightbulb icons (gracefully hidden when empty)
ServiceFAQ - Expandable accordion with HelpCircle icons
ServiceCTA - Dark bg conversion block with 2 buttons

graceful_use_cases_skip.note: Use Cases section gracefully hidden when no use_cases data

faq_expand_collapse.note: FAQ questions expand/collapse correctly with chevron rotation

navbar_footer_on_service_pages.footer: PremiumFooterV2 renders correctly with all links (About Us, Help Center, Privacy Policy, Terms of Service)

critical_code_review_comments: CanonicalServicePage template properly assembles 8 sub-components from /components/services/canonical/
DynamicServiceDetailPage has proper fallback to comprehensiveServiceData.js when backend API returns 404
ServiceUseCases and ServiceFAQ gracefully return null when items array is empty
All canonical components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
ServiceHero correctly constructs quote request URL with service slug parameter

success_rate.backend: N/A (no backend tests needed for this iteration)

seed_data_creation: None - using existing static data from comprehensiveServiceData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 244 verified the new canonical ServicePageTemplate with 8 sections. All priority service pages (printing-promotional-materials, office-branding, graphic-design-support) work correctly via DynamicServiceDetailPage at /services/:slug. The ServiceDetailContent route at /services/:groupSlug/:serviceSlug shows 'Service Not Found' because backend service catalog is not seeded - this is expected behavior. Admin Settings Hub Welcome Bonus Campaign verified at /admin/settings-hub (not /admin/settings).
